allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add AvatarFactory v0.1.0 MVP implementation

- Multi-agent system with Orchestrator, PersonaLab, ContentLab, Review agents
- LLM provider abstraction supporting Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, and OpenAI
- Knowledge base for persona and content persistence \(YAML/JSON\)
- Platform adapters for Xiaohongshu, Zhihu, Twitter
- CLI interface with natural language chat mode
- Multi-dimensional review scoring \(persona consistency, platform fit, compliance, engagement\)
- Documentation and setup scripts for Windows/macOS/Linux

Key fixes:
- Azure OpenAI reasoning model \(gpt-5/o1\) compatibility
- Windows console Unicode encoding support
- YAML serialization for Pydantic enums

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from avatarfactory.adapters import XiaohongshuAdapter, ZhihuAdapter, TwitterAdapter; print\(''All adapters imported successfully''\)")
